changesProposed.name: Founders Fund

verified.name: Founders Fund
verified.thesis: Founders Fund invests in ambitious projects that resolve real challenges and create transformative technology. The firm has shifted from early-stage consumer internet toward hard tech, defense technology, space exploration, artificial intelligence, and biotech.
verified.notes: Founded July 2005. In 2025, raised Founders Fund Growth III at $4.6 billion for late-stage investments. AUM verified as US$17 billion as of 2025 per Wikipedia. Key partners list matches Wikipedia 'Key people' section.
